properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v9 v10 v11 v6 v12 v13

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Who would have thought that long ago So very far away A little child would be born And in a manger laid

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And who would have thought this little child Was born the King of Kings The Son of just a carpenter But for whom the angels sing

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: And who would have thought that as He grew And with other children played This child with whom they laughed and sang Would die for them some day

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: And who would have thought this little child Could make a blind man see Feed the hungry, make rich the poor And set the prisoner free

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Oh who would have thought this little child Was who the prophets said Would take away the sins of man And rise up from the dead

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: And I believe and I will always sing This little child is the King And I believe and I will always sing This little child He is the King of Kings

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Many years have come and gone Yet this world remains the same Empires have been built and fallen Only time has made a change

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Nation against nation Brother against brother Men so filled with hatred Still killing one another

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: And over half the world is starving While our banner of decency is torn Debating over disarmament While killing children before they're born

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: And fools who march to win the right To justify their sin Oh every nation that has fallen Has fallen from within

verse.name: v11
verse.lines: Yet in the midst of this darkness There is a hope, a light that burns This little child the King of Kings Some day will return

verse.name: v12
verse.lines: Who would have thought this little child Is who the prophets said Will return to judge this world The living and the dead

verse.name: v13
verse.lines: Oh can't you see, that long ago So very far away That Jesus Christ, our only hope Was born the King that day
